item.text: I’ll make the minimal schema and CRUD changes, then run the existing test suite against the configured database.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench brownfield acceptance passed: mongo/schema-evolution

item.text:
Added optional `riskScore` to the MongoDB accounts validator as an integer constrained to 0–100.

Existing generic CRUD already preserves optional fields in create, get, and update. `npm test` passes, including regression and `riskScore` coverage.
